title: ericameria palmeri var. pachylepis
intro: Ericameria palmeri var. pachylepis, also known as Palmer's goldenrod, is a shrub-like plant species native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ericameria palmeri var. pachylepis include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas or infusions from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
